title: 83 audit fixes — feed, messages, calls, wallet, settings, sync, memory leaks
notes: 3 CRASH FIXES: Edit Post from your profile, tapping likers, View My Moment — were ReferenceError on tap, now safe
DATA LOSS FIX: Account Settings + Expert App saves no longer wipe your cover, location, notif prefs, sound prefs from your profile bio
Settings: new useEffect prefills Account Settings from server on open (was localStorage-only — fresh install showed empty + could save empty over real data)
Coin sync: per-user storage key (multi-user devices), maybeSingle (new users), unique realtime channel per component, Wallet purchase is now near-atomic, CallScreen StrictMode-safe broadcast

Messages: chat realtime UPDATE/DELETE/reactions now propagate live, restrict/mute sync between ChatBox and inbox, blocks unified to blocks.js, photo upload fallback now inserts message row, scroll-up guard so new messages don't yank you down
Memory: video preview blob URLs now revoked, carouselIdx debounced, IntersectionObserver disconnects properly, lastSeen listeners cleanup, willChange resets after gesture

Polish: hashtags case-insensitive, double-submit guard on post, msgMenu position clamped, Wallet Luhn check + 4-digit Amex CVV + UPI regex + real rupee conversion, timeAgo no longer shifted by TZ, debug strings hidden in prod
